description: Persistent RNN as CL backbone — PyTorch trains, NumPy persists
architecture: TF-IDF(500) → PyTorch RNN(64) → Linear(7) → export → PersistentRNN → JSON checkpoint
caveat: Task-IL: sequential processing order supplies task ID. Not Class-IL.
key_insight: RNN hidden state naturally accumulates prior inputs. No external replay needed — the recurrent state IS compressed memory.

integration.train: PyTorch RNN with proper gradients + replay buffer
integration.persist: Export weights to NumPy PersistentRNN → JSON checkpoint
integration.deploy: Load checkpoint → RNN remembers all prior documents via weights

results.explanation: Val/test are unseen classes (4,5,6) — correct Class-IL behavior. 0% is expected.

limitations: RNN processes single vectors (seq_len=1) — needs multi-chunk sequences for temporal learning
Gradient-free Heosphoros training insufficient at 36K params — PyTorch needed for training
Val/test classes never seen — Class-IL gap, not Task-IL

full_stack.layer_0_substrate: persistent_rnn_v0.5.py — NumPy RNN with JSON checkpointing
full_stack.layer_1_physics: Coherence_Propulsion_Framework.txt — topological field theory, 111 Hz bridge
full_stack.layer_3_coherence: lvh_coherence_code.py — SCP protocol, DEM dashboard, LVH state tracking
full_stack.layer_5_cl: iami_v2_2_persistent_rnn_cl.py — PyTorch train + NumPy persist + JSON checkpoint
